---
title: "MO sample redist code"
output: html_document
---


```{r}
#packages and files
library(alarmdata)
library(redist)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggredist)
map_MO <- alarm_50state_map('MO')
```







  


# source of code:
# https://alarm-redist.org/redist/


```{r}
map_MO2 = redist_map(map_MO, existing_plan=cd_2020, pop_tol=0.005,
total_pop = pop, adj = map_MO$adj)

MO_plans = redist_smc(map_MO2, nsims=5)

library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork) # for plotting

redist.plot.plans(MO_plans, draws=c("cd_2020", "1", "2", "3", "4", "5"), shp=map_MO2)
```
